---
name: Correction
about: Fix a wrong coverage status, a stale or misquoted rating, or a governance detail
title: "[correction] <protocol> / <feed>"
labels: correction
---

**What is wrong?**
<!-- e.g. "DeFiScan coverage for Aave is shown as 'partial' but it is fully covered" -->

**Correct value**
<!-- The accurate coverage status / rating / governance fact -->

**Source (required)**
<!-- A link to the primary source that proves the correct value. Corrections are merged
only after the cited source is checked. -->

**File**
<!-- Optional: which file in lib/data/ holds the datum, if you know -->
